label: Credit Card Redaction
description: Synthetic payment card strings used to verify Luhn-backed card redaction and clean numeric passthrough.

cases.label: Hyphenated card format
cases.input: Use 4111-1111-1111-1111 for the synthetic billing sample.
cases.expected: Use [CC_REDACTED] for the synthetic billing sample.

cases.label: Invalid Luhn number stays visible
cases.input: Reference 4111111111111112 should not be treated as a card.
cases.expected: Reference 4111111111111112 should not be treated as a card.
